name: Blakes Limosne & Sedan Svc LLC
registry_source: California Secretary of State (bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov) - not directly searchable via web fetch
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record located under 'Blakes Limousine', 'Blakes Limosne', or 'Blakes' for Ross, CA. Only Michigan-based BLAKES (USDOT 2792576) and unrelated Blake's towing/trucking entities returned. Likely an intrastate-only CA TCP charter-party carrier regulated by CPUC rather than FMCSA. CPUC TCP portal did not surface a match in public web search. Not a school-bus operator — appears to be limousine/sedan service. Possibly the same operator as 'Blake Limousine, West Palm Beach FL' but cannot confirm.

name: Security Transport Svc
safety_rating: None (no safety violations recorded; 0 inspections with violations)
fmcsa_status: INACTIVE in SAFER (record exists; SAFER snapshot returns 'INACTIVE' as of fetch). QuickTransportSolutions lists it as 'active DOT registered motor carrier'. Conflicting signals — likely currently inactive on SAFER but operating; last MCS-150 filed 10/16/2024 reporting 1.5M miles for 2023.
inc_date: 1993-01-07 (per MCS-150 'In business since'); BBB profile lists 2006 business start, indicating possible reincorporation/restructuring
entity_status: Active (operating as Security Transport Services Inc, KS)
registry_source: Kansas Secretary of State (sos.ks.gov/businesses) - not directly searchable via web fetch; BBB profile and FMCSA MCS-150 used as proxy
notes: Strong match: name + address (1643 SW 41st St, Topeka, KS 66609) confirmed. Company is an armored car / interstate detainee transport (extradition) services provider for law enforcement — NOT a school-bus operator and NOT student transportation. Tuck-in fit for Summit School Services is unlikely. 6 power units, 30 drivers, ~$5-10M revenue, 20-49 employees. Domain sts1995.com suggests trade name since 1995; FMCSA MCS-150 reports 1993 inception. Holds KCC tariff (Kansas Corporation Commission) for passenger transport.
